name: snipershady/ratelimiter
description: A free and easy-to-use rate limiter

suggest.ext-apcu: Required to use the APCU backend (CacheEnum::APCU)
suggest.ext-redis: Required to use the native Redis extension backend (CacheEnum::PHP_REDIS)
suggest.ext-memcached: Required to use the Memcached backend (CacheEnum::MEMCACHED)

post-install-cmd:
echo "
✅ Dependencies installed. Run 'composer quality' to apply code quality fixes.
"
post-update-cmd:
echo "
✅ Dependencies updated. Run 'composer quality' to apply code quality fixes.
"

scripts-descriptions.rector-dry: Run Rector in dry-run mode (preview changes without applying)
scripts-descriptions.cs-fix: Fix code style issues with PHP-CS-Fixer
scripts-descriptions.cs-check: Check code style without making changes
scripts-descriptions.quality-check: Check code quality without making changes (dry-run mode)
